nameMeanings.name: VON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: KIRCHBERG
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places called Kirchberg in Rhineland, Saxony, or Württemberg.
German: topographic name for someone living at a church on a hill or on a hill so named, from Middle High German kirche ‘church’ + berc ‘mountain, hill’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Kirchberg ‘church mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Konrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Konrad I. VON KIRCHBERG was born as the son of Eberhard II. VON KIRCHBERG HOHENBERG. He had at least 1 son with Berchta VON EBERSTALL. He died in 1240.
